pageSubtitle: Manage your organization, members, and integrations

noOrg.title: No Organization
noOrg.description: Create a new organization or join an existing one with an invite code.
noOrg.requestSubmitted: Request submitted! You will receive an email once it is reviewed.

companyRag.title: Company RAG
companyRag.description: Shared organization documents. Each companion can choose to include them in its knowledge base.
companyRag.uploadSuccess: Document added to the company RAG.
companyRag.deleteConfirm: Delete this document from the company RAG?
companyRag.importNoSupported: No supported files in this folder.
companyRag.folderDeleteConfirm: Delete this folder? (it must be empty)
companyRag.cvBaseBadgeTitle: CV base: documents imported here are analyzed as CVs.
companyRag.cvBaseEnableConfirm: Mark this folder as a CV base? Future documents imported here will be analyzed as CVs (documents already present are not re-processed).
companyRag.cvBaseDisabled: Folder is no longer a CV base.
companyRag.cvBaseError: Could not change the CV-base status.
companyRag.noFolders: Create a folder to get started.

request.pendingBody: Your request for the organization "{{name}}" is being reviewed by our team. You will receive an email once it is processed.
request.rejectedBody: Your previous request for "{{name}}" was rejected.

info.title: Organization
info.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this organization?
info.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this organization? Member accounts will not be deleted.

members.title: Members
members.removeConfirm: Remove this member from the organization?

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.regenerateConfirm: This will invalidate the current invite code. Continue?

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Configure shared credentials for all organization members.
integrations.removeConfirm: Remove this integration? The credentials will be deleted.

agents.title: Organization Agents
agents.name: Name
agents.noAgents: No agents in this organization yet
agents.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this agent from the organization?

slashCommands.title: Prompt Shortcuts
slashCommands.description: Configure / commands to send predefined prompts to your companions

modal.promptPlaceholder: Analyze AI trends over the last 6 months...
